scopes.name: storage:events:write
scopes.comment: Ingest custom business events through the current user's permissions.

scopes.name: storage:logs:write
scopes.comment: Ingest custom log records through the current user's permissions.

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: Let the sample data page query ingested logs.

scopes.name: storage:smartscape:read
scopes.comment: Populate the Davis entity picker from Smartscape nodes.

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Required for Grail queries in the sample data page.

scopes.name: automation:workflows:write
scopes.comment: Create workflows from pasted workflow JSON.

scopes.name: settings:objects:read
scopes.comment: Read existing Site Reliability Guardian settings objects before updates.

scopes.name: settings:objects:write
scopes.comment: Create and update Site Reliability Guardian settings objects.

scopes.name: settings:schemas:read
scopes.comment: Read Settings schema metadata for Site Reliability Guardian permissions.

scopes.name: storage:system:read
scopes.comment: Search recent users from dt.system.events for dashboard ownership transfer.

scopes.name: document:documents:read
scopes.comment: Read dashboard metadata before transferring ownership.

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: Transfer dashboard ownership with the Documents API.

scopes.name: document:documents:admin
scopes.comment: Allow admin dashboard ownership transfer for documents the user does not own.
